title: pueraria candollei var. mirifica
intro: Pueraria candollei var. mirifica, also known as Kwao Krua, is a plant native to Thailand and other parts of Southeast Asia, belonging to the legume family. The plant is prized for its medicinal properties, particularly its isoflavone content, which has been traditionally used to enhance estrogen levels and alleviate menopausal symptoms. The health benefits of Pueraria candollei var. mirifica include improved bone density, reduced hot flashes, and enhanced cardiovascular health, making it a popular natural remedy for menopausal women. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including capsules, tablets, and teas, which can be consumed to reap its benefits.
